nodes.label: P2.1 CIFAR — effective rank / Fisher ratio / NCC across the grid
nodes.rationale: none+lin/batchBN+sq flatline near-0 effective rank; healthy cells (layer+lin, onlineBN+lin, layer+sq) hold rank ~48-55, yet Fisher ratio and NCC clustering accuracy for the same healthy cells still decline steadily (NCC ~0.28->~0.16) -- representation stays high-dimensional but not more class-separable, the mechanism-fixed-but-insufficient finding.
